updates.title: Leave encashment tax relief: Eligibility and exemption limits explained
updates.summary: Salaried employees can carry forward unused paid leaves and opt for leave encashment instead of taking time off. This encashment is taxable, with treatment varying based on whether it's received during employment or upon retirement.&nbsp;

updates.title: Capital gains taxation of hybrid funds: How different types of hybrid funds are taxed?
updates.summary: Capital gains taxation of mutual funds depends on how much the fund invests in equity and debt. Since hybrid funds have different equity-debt allocations, the tax treatment of their capital gains varies based on their portfolio allocation.
